releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.0.1

### Bug Fixes
- **Fix demo data showing when vault is connected**: When the plugin connected to an Obsidian vault, the UI would show hardcoded sample data (Sony A7C, Tokyo trip, etc.) instead of the actual vault content. This happened because `useState` was initialized with sample data, and if `refreshVaultData()` failed silently, the state was never updated. Now the app initializes with empty state, shows a loading spinner while fetching vault data, and properly clears stale data on errors.
